phaseGoal: 在 release 分支里集中打磨新用户上手路径，避免频繁提交 main，并让跨平台启动、macOS 快捷入口、skill 边界和 release checklist 更清楚。
deliverable: npm run start, README quick start polish, usage guide startup matrix, release checklist onboarding gates
stopCondition: new users can choose a clear startup path from README, release-adjacent docs are consistent, and lightweight verification passes on the release branch.
